title: Wide mux cells ($_MUX4_ et al) are incorrectly marked as evaluable

features.name: 4-to-1 mux with 2-bit select evaluated with set-undef
features.description: Code should include a $_MUX4_ cell (4-to-1 mux with two select inputs S and T) being evaluated with the eval command using -set-undef flag, where the cell is incorrectly marked as evaluable causing infinite loops when select inputs are undefined
features.snippet:
cell $_MUX4_ \UUT
  connect \A \A
  connect \B \B
  connect \C \C
  connect \D \D
  connect \S \S
  connect \T \T
  connect \Y \Y
end
